Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_e879122a-6b93-4d3b-9a10-49a600882ccb","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_e879122a-6b93-4d3b-9a10-49a600882ccb"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"253e8a7c-20f9-4ebf-add4-32713f0e617b"},"authorName":"Austin Decker","description":"The UIHTML Debugger is a non-intrusive toolkit designed to bridge the gap between MATLAB and JavaScript development. It provides two essential tools to streamline web-based UI development within MATLAB.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_e879122a-6b93-4d3b-9a10-49a600882ccb","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_e879122a-6b93-4d3b-9a10-49a600882ccb"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"a2bd07ad-eeaa-4e6a-949a-c75564bf3dd4"},"maxRelease":"R2025b","minRelease":"R2014b","outputFileName":"uihtml_debugger.mltbx","outputFolder":"release","summary":"MATLAB UIHTML Debugger","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"toolbox","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_e879122a-6b93-4d3b-9a10-49a600882ccb","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_e879122a-6b93-4d3b-9a10-49a600882ccb"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"95c9122e-4ee1-4cf1-be4e-b586d3f56cea"},"toolboxName":"uihtml_debugger","toolboxVersion":"1.1.3","uniqueId":"35da3f7c-30f8-467f-81c6-e62ba3206be6"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"0d280020-8b56-44d2-aa8f-04ed650919e6"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"46190ffa-3b95-44dd-a9ad-fbc0a96b5b05"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
